problem id: 6c41f684
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  11101010 -> 10111110
  00000010 -> 10000000
  00011100 -> 00000111
  11110000 -> 00111111
  00111101 -> 01001111
  01001011 -> 11010110
  10101110 -> 10101011
  01111100 -> 00011111
  01011000 -> 00010111
  10101011 -> 11101010

query: 00110000
predicted answer: 00001111
